content.question: Can partisan political consensus be sustained over the multi-year timeline required for phased piloting and scaling of any structural change to admissions systems, or will the reform agenda be subject to reversal or dismantling in subsequent electoral cycles?
content.reduction_path: Establish a multi-party expert steering committee with terms exceeding electoral cycles; document baseline positions of all parliamentary parties; design an implementation roadmap with explicit opposition veto points and early-warning triggers for depoliticization
